name: Mint Chutney
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald and peel the tomatoes.
2. Chop the vegetables and fruit.
3. Add the chopped mint to the mixture.
4. Scald and cool the vinegar.
5. Add mustard, salt, and sugar to the cooled vinegar.
6. Combine the vinegar mixture with the chopped ingredients.
7. Mix until well blended.
8. Let the chutney stand for 10 days, stirring occasionally.
